name: Bilt Obsidian Card

welcome_offer.requirement: Spend $5,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening

earning_rates.description: 2X Bilt points on all purchases (base rate)
Up to 5X points on a choice of category (up to $25,000/year) — dining, travel, or online shopping

features: Annual travel credit: $100 Bilt Travel portal credit
Earn up to 1.33X points on rent (up to 100% of rent as points)
Rent Day perk: double points on the 1st of each month
